# Generated by founder-os gtm-aeo-files.sh — edit freely to tighten or loosen.

# Default: allow all standard web crawlers.
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# AI / LLM crawlers — explicitly allowed so your content is reachable
# by Answer-Engine results (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.).
# Comment out any User-agent block below to opt that crawler OUT.

Allow: /

Allow: /
